title: chrysopogon monticola
intro: Chrysopogon monticola, also known as Vetiver grass, is a tropical grass native to India, Sri Lanka, and other parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Chrysopogon monticola include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing skin irritations. Chrysopogon monticola can be prepared as an essential oil, tea, or powder for various herbal applications, including aromatherapy and topical treatments.
